title: Combat Multi-view Display
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:CMD.png|thumb|right|250px|Combat Multi-view Display on a [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]]]]
'''Combat Multi-view Display''' was the main sensor readout on a starfighter. Although functions appeared to vary depending on the model of CMD used, they generally displayed sensor readouts on targeted ships, including [[Deflector shield/Legends|deflector shield]] strength and hull integrity. Some models showed a targeting reticule, though targeting was generally done using other systems such as the [[Heads-up display/Legends|heads-up display]] or [[Targeting computer/Legends|targeting computer]].
